title: rinorea johnstonei
intro: Rinorea johnstonei, also known as the Johnstone's tinospore, is a plant species native to New Guinea. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antispasmodic properties. Rinorea johnstonei is often used in herbal preparations, such as infusions and decoctions, to make teas that are consumed to alleviate its health benefits.
